tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
Marie Curie was a pioneering scientist whose contributions to physics and chemistry changed the course of modern science. Born in Warsaw in 1867, she faced enormous obstacles as a woman 1.1. _________ a university education in 19th-century Poland. Women were not permitted to attend university in Russian-controlled Warsaw, so Marie moved to Paris, 1.2. _________ she enrolled at the Sorbonne and excelled in her studies.

She became the first woman to win a Nobel Prize and remains the only 1.3. _________ in history to have won Nobel Prizes in two different sciences — physics in 1903 and chemistry in 1911. Together with her husband Pierre, she discovered two new elements: polonium, 1.4. _________ she named after her home country, and radium.

Curie's research 1.5. _________ the foundation for the development of X-rays, which transformed medical diagnosis. Despite her extraordinary achievements, she was denied 1.6. _________ of the French Academy of Sciences solely on the basis of her gender.

Her dedication to science knew no 1.7. _________. Even during the First World War, she developed mobile X-ray units to help 1.8. _________ wounded soldiers. Marie Curie died in 1934 as a 1.9. _________ of prolonged exposure to radiation — a risk that was little understood at the time. Her legacy lives 1.10. _________ not only in scientific progress but also as an inspiration to women in science worldwide.
